scope: Authored scenario corpus: measures channel discrimination on known implementation patterns and known false-positive traps (module-homonym bases, same-name-different-domain methods, substring decorator matches). It does NOT estimate in-the-wild base rates; n per channel is small and disclosed.

targets.description: Class target: declared subclasses, incl. a module-homonym trap.

labels.name: StripeGateway
labels.why: declared subclass implementing the full protocol

labels.name: CsvPaymentReport
labels.why: subclasses the unrelated reporting.PaymentProvider homonym — name-collision trap

targets.description: Method target: subclass overrides plus duck-typed conformers and same-name-different-domain traps.

targets.description: Event-protocol target: decorator-registered handlers plus substring-match traps.
